Scoring Rubric (LLM-as-Judge, 5 dimensions)

  • Specificity (25%): Mentions specific CustomGPT features, use cases, or outcomes
  • Sentiment (20%): Genuinely positive customer language
  • Metrics (25%): Numbers, percentages, time/money saved
  • Attributability (15%): Identifiable person + company
  • Publishability (15%): Quote usable on marketing website as-is
